description: Hybrid agent context: each entry has a TEXT variant and an optional VISUAL variant of the SAME content. Vision-capable agents load ONLY image (+ short caption). Non-vision agents load ONLY text. Never both for the same id (no double-dip).

entries.title: TG Agent Relay architecture
entries.caption: Outbound hooks → relay-notify → tg-send; inbound tg-poll → handlers or agent. Zero model tokens on status path.

entries.title: Multi-backend and project chat routing
entries.caption: Sticky project rooms (group or forum topic); backend via @prefix or room default; allowlist by user id.

entries.title: Token usage dashboard legend
entries.caption: Local opt-in usage: by model, provider share, project; window Nd/Nm/Ny/lifetime (local retained).
